name: orchardist
description: The orchardist marketplace — companion plugins for the orchardist worktree/session dashboard. Hosts the orchardist plugin (recall skill) and the orchard-chat cross-machine chat plugin.

plugins.name: orchardist
plugins.description: Recall: search and synthesize context from past Claude Code conversations across all projects.

plugins.name: orchard-chat
plugins.description: Cross-machine chat channel for orchardists. Connects to the orchard-chat broker (Bun WS+HTTP service on boxd) and pushes messages into Claude as <channel source="orchard-chat" ...> events. Exposes a chat:post reply tool. Orchardists listen+post; workers/sisters post-only via the chat-post shell helper.

plugins.name: procedure-adherence
plugins.description: Guaranteed procedure adherence under context load: a UserPromptSubmit hook retrieves + Haiku-compiles the governing procedure into a binding sheet, and a per-procedure blocking Stop gate (Sonnet, no GPT in runtime) refuses to end the turn until every authored chain step has a corresponding action. Per-agent/session exemption brick-guard included. Ported from the sc#784-proven recipe.
